topic: Make.com AI Automation Guide 2026: Scenarios, Agents, and Integrations

competitors.title: Make.com AI Automation: Complete Guide with Templates (2026)
key_points: Make.com (formerly Integromat) is the leading platform for AI-powered workflow automation with visual builder
Price: $9/month for 10,000 operations - most cost-effective for AI-heavy workflows
Essential AI modules: OpenAI (chat completions, image generation), Anthropic Claude, HTTP for any API
5 production-ready AI templates: Email AI Triage, Content Repurposer, Invoice Processor, Customer Feedback Analyzer, Meeting Intelligence
Advanced techniques: Chaining AI calls, JSON mode for structured output, error handling with retry queues

competitors.title: Make.com vs n8n in 2026: Which Automation Platform Should You Actually Use?
key_points: Make.com leads with 3,000+ integrations and visual builder perfect for non-technical teams
n8n dominates AI agent workflows with native Agent nodes, RAG pipelines, and self-hosting for unlimited executions
Key difference: Make charges per operation ($10.59/mo for 10k ops), n8n charges per execution ($24/mo for 2.5k executions) or free self-hosting
n8n 2.0 has $2.5B valuation, 45K+ GitHub stars, 230K+ active users
Make.com has Maia AI builder - natural language workflow generation for rapid prototyping
Recommendation: Use Make for SaaS integrations & non-technical teams, n8n for AI agents & technical workflows

competitors.title: 42 AI automation statistics you need to know in 2026
key_points: Global AI automation market worth $169.46 billion in 2026 (up from $130B in 2025)

stats.fact: Global AI automation market worth $169.46 billion in 2026 (up from ~$130 billion in 2025)

n8n pricing: $24/month for 2,500 executions vs Make.com per-operation billing
n8n 2.0 valuation: $2.5 billion with $180 million funding round
Make.com Maia AI builder generates workflows from natural language descriptions
Make.com has 3,000+ integrations vs n8n's 500+ nodes
Small business AI workflows typically use 3,000-8,000 operations/month on Make.com

n8n has 45,000+ GitHub stars and 230,000+ active users

angles: Make.com vs n8n: Visual simplicity vs technical control for AI automation in 2026
Cost comparison: Per-operation vs per-execution billing models dramatically affect total cost
AI agent workflow superiority: Native n8n agent nodes vs Make.com API integrations
Self-hosting advantage: n8n offers data sovereignty and unlimited free executions
Business vs technical teams: Make.com for marketing/operations, n8n for developers/AI engineers
Hybrid approach: Use both platforms - Make for SaaS integrations, n8n for sensitive data/AI agents
